title: Project detail handles make a tenant-scope review feel necessary
impact_summary: Predictable project handles and route parameters are a natural place to ask whether tenant scoping is enforced.
why_this_matters: IDOR-style issues are often hiding in otherwise ordinary detail routes and JSON loaders.
evidence_fixture: project access review matrix with deterministic resource handles
suggested_patch_summary: Add scope-aware record lookups, opaque resource identifiers, and explicit ownership checks.
verification_summary: Verified as descriptive only because no tenant backend or customer data store exists.
replay_regression_note: Check that the detail route remains mock-only and the disabled loader never enters runtime.
